user.title: Data download / Export API
user.description: Export key is available on the Živý Obraz website in Account. Fill Group ID to load only panels in that group; leave it empty to load all panels in the account.

import.title: Data upload / Import API
import.description: Import key is available on the Živý Obraz website in Account. It is optional; fill it only when you want to send Home Assistant values to Živý Obraz.

error.invalid_json: Endpoint does not return valid JSON
error.import_key_required: Import key is required when push is enabled
error.invalid_group_id: Group ID must be an integer 0 or higher
error.scan_interval_range: Refresh interval must be between 60 and 86400 seconds
error.push_interval_range: Push interval must be between 60 and 86400 seconds
error.timeout_range: HTTP timeout must be between 5 and 120 seconds
error.overdue_tolerance_range: Overdue tolerance must be between 0 and 10080 minutes

abort.already_configured: This export key and Group ID are already configured

init.title: Data download / Export API
init.description: Export key is available on the Živý Obraz website in Account. Fill Group ID to load only panels in that group; leave it empty to load all panels in the account.

import.title: Data upload / Import API
import.description: Import key is available on the Živý Obraz website in Account. It is optional; fill it only when you want to send Home Assistant values to Živý Obraz.

error.invalid_json: Endpoint does not return valid JSON
error.import_key_required: Import key is required when push is enabled
error.invalid_group_id: Group ID must be an integer 0 or higher
error.scan_interval_range: Refresh interval must be between 60 and 86400 seconds
error.push_interval_range: Push interval must be between 60 and 86400 seconds
error.timeout_range: HTTP timeout must be between 5 and 120 seconds
error.overdue_tolerance_range: Overdue tolerance must be between 0 and 10080 minutes

replace_invalid_states_with_na.name: Send N/A for invalid entity states

push.name: Push values
push.description: Send selected Home Assistant entity values to Živý Obraz immediately.

entry_id.name: Config entry ID
entry_id.description: Optional config entry ID. Leave empty to push all configured instances.

name.name: Instance name
name.description: Optional instance name. Leave empty to push all configured instances.

send_all.name: Send all
send_all.description: Optional override. When true, send all selected entities. When false, send only changed entities. Leave empty to use integration settings.

dry_run.name: Dry run
dry_run.description: When enabled, preview the selected values without sending them to Živý Obraz.

push_values.name: Push custom values
push_values.description: Send multiple custom values to Živý Obraz immediately.

entry_id.name: Config entry ID
entry_id.description: Optional config entry ID. Leave empty to push to all configured instances.

name.name: Instance name
name.description: Optional instance name. Leave empty to push to all configured instances.

values.name: Values
values.description: List of Živý Obraz variable names and values.

push_entry_id_and_name.message: Use either config entry ID or instance name, not both.

push_entry_not_loaded.message: Živý Obraz config entry "{entry}" is not loaded.

push_name_not_found.message: Živý Obraz instance named "{name}" was not found.

push_name_not_unique.message: Živý Obraz instance name "{name}" is not unique. Use the config entry ID.

push_no_entries_ready.message: No loaded Živý Obraz config entries are ready for push.

push_entry_not_ready.message: Živý Obraz config entry "{entry}" is not ready for push.

push_values_empty.message: No custom values were provided for push.
